i want you to know my sweet girl that...

When I look at you and your picture, I wonder how I got so lucky to love someone as beautiful as you. Even with all the distance between us, you continue to be my favorite person, my favorite thought, and the person my being recognize and long for.

I miss you always, more than I can explain, babba. I miss your voice, your beautiful smile, your pretty brown eyes, how you care for me, and all the little things that make you you. I miss holding you, taking care of you, making you laugh, and simply being beside you.

I can't wait until I can finally hold you again and remind you in person just how much I love and crave you.

Thank you for being you, my pretty Trisha. Thank you for letting me love you despite everything that I have put you through.

I love you so much, my sexy and pretty Trisha. More than yesterday, and even more tomorrow. No matter the distance, no matter the time, and no matter what we go through. I will always want you. I will always love you, no matter what, always, and regardless, my pretty babba.

I love you with all my energy (even when they are destroyed).

I belong with you; always,
❤️ Clumsy Babba

we look so cute here baby (˶>⩊<˶)

i cant wait to make more memories with you mahal ko

what i miss the most

Sleeping Beside You

how u reach for me even if ure not fully awake, how u cuddle up to me like ure seeking my warmth, your cute mannerisms: sleep talking, your cute snores, that little drool, like ure trying to taste something in your dream, your teeth grinding (all of it mahal ko, i find them all endearing), how i cover u with our blanket because i hogged it last night, and u being the first and most beautiful sight i see when i wake up.

Taking Care of You

i miss cooking for you baby, i miss tidying up your things for u, i miss driving for you, carrying your bag, accompanying u on ur errands, tying your shoes and putting on your socks, fixing your napkin, i miss putting food on ur plate, i just simply miss being there when you need me to do something for you.

You

i miss you mahal. your cute laugh, especially when i tickle you, how u scrunch up your nose when i compliment you, ur scent, ur hair, ur feet, ur armpit. i miss holding you by your waist and hand, i miss holding you close to me, i miss peppering ur face and body with my kiss, i miss smelling you my babba. i miss your massage, how u stroke my hair to make me fall asleep, i miss your bok bok, your cute tantrums, the way u curse when someone's trying to roadrage you. i miss all of you mahal ko. i miss you so much :<

❤️

I love you and only you, my pretty Mei Mei.

Thank you for loving me mahal ko. Happy Mot Mot! HEHEHEHE


I WANT MORE MOT MOTS, ANNIVERSARIES, BIRTHDAYS, AND WEDDING ANNIVERSARIES WITH U BABY.
